ddls:
CREATE TABLE "utterances" (
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utterance */,
  "utterance" TEXT /* The actual text of the user utterance */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the utterance was recorded */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the intent prediction */,
  "channel" TEXT /* The communication channel (e.g., web, mobile app, phone) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the utterance */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session in which the utterance was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geolocation data if available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utterance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intents" (
  "intent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intent */,
  "golden_intent" TEXT /* The actual intent as defined for training */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the intent represents */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the intent (e.g., product inquiry, feedback) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the intent (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utterance that was analyzed */,
  "predicted_intent" TEXT /* The intent predicted by the system */,
  "match" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the predicted intent matches the golden intent */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Reference to the model version used for prediction */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response generated for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_version FOREIGN KEY ("model_version") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_utterance_id FOREIGN KEY ("utterance_id") REFERENCES utterances ("utterance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detected entity */,
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utterance where the entity was detected */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., color, action) */,
  "entity_value" TEXT /* Value of the detected entity */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the entity detection */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the entity (e.g., user, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_utterance_id FOREIGN KEY ("utterance_id") REFERENCES utterances ("utterance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "intent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intent this response is associated with */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response that the chatbot will use */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., text, image, link) */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session in which the response was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_intent_id FOREIGN KEY ("intent_id") REFERENCES intents ("intent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utterance that was logged */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prediction that was logged */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the interaction */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session in which the interaction occurred */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_utterance_id FOREIGN KEY ("utterance_id") REFERENCES utterances ("utterance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, developer, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utterance this feedback relates to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the chatbot's response (1-5) */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session in which the feedback was provided */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response the feedback is about */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_utterance_id FOREIGN KEY ("utterance_id") REFERENCES utterances ("utterance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training entry */,
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utterance used for training */,
  "intent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intent associated with this training data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the training data was created */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Reference to the model version used for training */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the training data (e.g., user, synthetic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_utterance_id FOREIGN KEY ("utterance_id") REFERENCES utterances ("utterance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_intent_id FOREIGN KEY ("intent_id") REFERENCES intents ("intent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_model_version FOREIGN KEY ("model_version") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the model version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Reference to the user who created the model version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version being evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy score of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the evaluation was recorded */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Reference to the model version being evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples used for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_version FOREIGN KEY ("model_version") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intent_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "intent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intent being tracked */,
  "utterance_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times this intent was triggered */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date when this intent was last used */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Reference to the model version used to detect the intent */,
  "session_count" INTEGER /* Number of sessions in which the intent was used */,
  "average_confidence_score" REAL /* Average confidence score for the intent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intent_usage_model_version FOREIGN KEY ("model_version") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intent_usage_intent_id FOREIGN KEY ("intent_id") REFERENCES intents ("intent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intent_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry on intent */,
  "intent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intent being provided feedback on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the intent clarity (1-5) */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response the feedback is about */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session in which the feedback was provided */,
  "improvement_suggestion" TEXT /* Text for suggesting improvements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intent_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intent_feedback_intent_id FOREIGN KEY ("intent_id") REFERENCES intents ("intent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intent_feedback_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)
